name_en: 【Exclusive Real Shot g11299 White Multicolor】This Emily notebook cover is from the Louis Vuitton x Takashi Murakami collaboration series, playfully reinterpreting the brand's classic elements with Monogram Multicolor canvas. The elegant background features Murakami's aesthetic colorful prints, while the leather interior flap and replaceable design add artisanal details. It can be paired with the Jane notebook, making it an elegant choice for long-lasting companionship. 22.5 x 2 x 14 cm (Height x Width x Length)
